UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user within the LocalBid Exchange platform, storing their profile information, verification status, and aggregated performance metrics as a seller.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

username.description: Unique username chosen by the user.

email.description: User's email address, used for communication and login.

phone.description: User's phone number for OTP verification.

bio.description: A short biographical description provided by the user.

profileImageUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

locationLatitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the user's primary location.

locationLongitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the user's primary location.

isIdVerified.description: Indicates if the user has completed the ID verification process.

totalSalesCount.description: The total number of successful sales made by this user.

reliabilityScore.description: An aggregate score reflecting the seller's reliability.

registrationDate.description: The date and time when the user registered.

ProductListing.title: ProductListing
ProductListing.description: Represents an item listed for sale or auction on the platform.

sellerId.description: Reference to the UserProfile of the seller.

title.description: The title of the product listing.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

condition.description: The physical condition of the item.

imageUrls.description: An array of URLs pointing to images of the product.

listingLocationLatitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the product's location.

listingLocationLongitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the product's location.

postedDate.description: The date and time when the product was listed.

isAuction.description: Indicates if the listing is an auction.

isBoosted.description: Indicates if the listing is boosted (monetization).
